task_completion.visual_evidence: The StudioTax 2024 application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Access Julian Rossi's tax documents from the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer window open to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\rossi\ or a document viewer showing a tax document from this folder.

task_completion.description: Create a new tax return for Julian Rossi.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The StudioTax interface shows 'Julian Rossi' entered in the personal information section or the taxpayer identification wizard.

task_completion.description: Enter data from the tax documents into the StudioTax return.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax forms, schedules, or slips (e.g., T4, T5, etc.) are actively being filled out with numerical data corresponding to a tax return.

task_completion.description: Save the completed return as 'julian_rossi.24t' in the specified Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box or file explorer showing the file 'julian_rossi.24t' being saved to or existing in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the StudioTax 2024 graphical user interface to complete the return.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through StudioTax menus, wizards, and forms rather than using a script or text editor to generate the .24t file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the software and create a dummy output file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing commands like 'touch', 'echo', or 'copy' being used to instantly create 'julian_rossi.24t'.

integrity.description: The agent actually opened and viewed the source tax documents to extract information.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the tax documents (PDFs, images, etc.) open and visible on screen at some point before or during data entry into StudioTax.
